explanation.uz: "A" chop etiladi, keyin throw xato tashlaydi — shuning uchun "B" ga yetmaydi. Boshqaruv catch blokiga o'tadi va "C" chiqadi. Natija: A C.
explanation.en: "A" is printed, then throw raises an error — so "B" is never reached. Control jumps to catch and "C" prints. Result: A C.

explanation.uz: `finally` bloki xato bo'ladimi yoki yo'qmi — DOIMO ishlaydi. Bu yerda xato yo'q, shuning uchun avval "try", keyin "finally" chiqadi.
explanation.en: The `finally` block ALWAYS runs, whether or not there's an error. Here there's no error, so "try" prints first, then "finally".

question:
What type of error occurs?

```js
console.log(undefinedVariable);
```

explanation.uz: E'lon qilinmagan o'zgaruvchiga murojaat qilinganda `ReferenceError` yuz beradi ("undefinedVariable is not defined").
explanation.en: Referencing an undeclared variable causes a `ReferenceError` ("undefinedVariable is not defined").

explanation.uz: null qiymatida metod chaqirilsa `TypeError` yuz beradi ("Cannot read properties of null"). TypeError — noto'g'ri tipdagi qiymat bilan amal qilinganda.
explanation.en: Calling a method on null throws a `TypeError` ("Cannot read properties of null"). A TypeError occurs when operating on a value of the wrong type.

question: Which block catches an exception in JavaScript?

explanation.uz: JavaScript'da xatolik `try ... catch` konstruksiyasi bilan ushlanadi. `except` (Python), `rescue` (Ruby) — boshqa tillarga tegishli.
explanation.en: In JavaScript, exceptions are caught with the `try ... catch` construct. `except` (Python) and `rescue` (Ruby) belong to other languages.

explanation.uz: `new Error("bad")` xato obyektini yaratadi, uning `message` xossasi "bad". catch bloki uni ushlaydi va e.message → "bad".
explanation.en: `new Error("bad")` creates an error object whose `message` property is "bad". The catch block catches it and e.message → "bad".

explanation.uz: Massiv uzunligi manfiy bo'lishi mumkin emas — `new Array(-1)` `RangeError` ("Invalid array length") tashlaydi. RangeError — qiymat ruxsat etilgan diapazondan tashqarida bo'lganda.
explanation.en: An array length can't be negative — `new Array(-1)` throws a `RangeError` ("Invalid array length"). A RangeError occurs when a value is outside the allowed range.

explanation.uz: `finally` return bajarilishidan OLDIN ishlaydi. Avval "finally" chop etiladi, keyin funksiya "try" ni qaytaradi va u chop etiladi. Tartib: finally, try.
explanation.en: `finally` runs BEFORE the return completes. First "finally" prints, then the function returns "try", which is printed. Order: finally, try.

explanation.uz: JavaScript'da istalgan qiymatni throw qilish mumkin — nafaqat Error obyektini. Bu yerda string tashlangan, shuning uchun typeof e → "string".
explanation.en: In JavaScript you can throw any value — not just an Error object. Here a string is thrown, so typeof e → "string".

explanation.uz: null obyektning xossasiga murojaat qilish `TypeError` tashlaydi. e.name → "TypeError".
explanation.en: Accessing a property on null throws a `TypeError`. e.name → "TypeError".

explanation.uz: try blokida xato yo'q, shuning uchun catch (B) o'tkazib yuboriladi. finally esa doim ishlaydi. Natija: A C.
explanation.en: There's no error in the try block, so catch (B) is skipped. finally always runs. Result: A C.

explanation.uz: Noto'g'ri formatdagi JSON'ni parse qilganda `SyntaxError` yuz beradi. e.name → "SyntaxError".
explanation.en: Parsing malformed JSON throws a `SyntaxError`. e.name → "SyntaxError".

explanation.uz: Ichki catch "x" ni ushlaydi, lekin yangi xato ("y") tashlaydi (rethrow). Tashqi catch "y" ni ushlaydi → "y".
explanation.en: The inner catch catches "x" but throws a new error ("y") — a rethrow. The outer catch catches "y" → "y".

explanation.uz: Cheksiz rekursiya stek (call stack) ni to'ldiradi va `RangeError` ("Maximum call stack size exceeded") tashlaydi.
explanation.en: Infinite recursion fills the call stack and throws a `RangeError` ("Maximum call stack size exceeded").

explanation.uz: ES2019 dan boshlab catch parametrini (e) tushirib qoldirish mumkin. Xato ushlanadi va "caught" chop etiladi.
explanation.en: Since ES2019, the catch parameter (e) can be omitted. The error is caught and "caught" is printed.
